name: NERO Design Team
purpose: Reusable local design operating system for frontend UI, image reports, PPTX decks, web PPT/HTML decks, short videos, AI-generated visual素材, and KAT x NDT presentation production chains. It routes work through brand assets, design tokens, local templates, repository references, restricted local design assets, fused frontend/PPT/effective-html taste rules, presentation harness references, KAT-to-NERO handoff contracts, presentation production packets, design specs, style locks, visual exploration, project generators, project-local integration manifests, case library references, export validation, gpt-image-2 briefs, visual QA, visual scoring, production checks, and the global AGENTS.md 设计团队 strong-route rule.

disabled_when: The phrase 设计团队 is used in a non-design context.
The task is purely factual, legal, financial, database, evidence, or code-only work with no visual design surface.
global_trigger_route.routing_rule: When NERO mentions 设计团队 or standalone ndt/NDT in a design-related request, Codex must prioritize $CODEX_HOME/skills/nero-design-team/SKILL.md and handle the task through NERO Design Team routing.
global_trigger_route.boundary: This is a global Codex cooperation rule, not an OS-level keyword listener. Skill and MCP remain model/tool-mediated.

project_integration.boundary: NERO Design Team is the central design-system backend. Project-specific deliverables stay in each target project.

presentation_handoff_contract.routing_rule: When a PPT task includes KAT, deck brief, slide plan, story spine, evidence-to-slide map, or presentation_handoff_contract, NERO Design Team reads the handoff rule before visual production and chooses the downstream PPT subroute from the contract output lane.
boundary: KAT owns story, evidence, claims, slide intent, exact data/text boundaries, and return-to-KAT conditions.
NERO owns visual route, layout system, typography, chart treatment, image direction, visual QA, visual score, and production-check readiness.
NERO must return content issues to KAT instead of silently changing conclusions, exact figures, source notes, regulatory wording, or must-preserve action titles.
Presentations remains the default formal editable PPTX engine.

mcp_lite.registration_note: Run install.mjs and add your own Codex MCP configuration if you want MCP-lite tools in a new environment.
mcp_lite.role: Local tool execution layer. Skill remains the routing and design-judgment layer.

boundary: Public package contains portable rules, tokens, templates, scripts, MCP-lite, Skill source, and lightweight snapshots.
Private/client assets, restricted external assets, local validation history, and real project deliverables stay outside the public repository.
Installers rewrite $NERO_DESIGN_TEAM_HOME and $CODEX_HOME placeholders at install time.

fused_reference_skills.name: impeccable
fused_reference_skills.use_for: Detector-style frontend design review, anti-pattern checklist, deterministic UI QA, and final polish.
fused_reference_skills.avoid_for: Default npm install, hooks, live mode, browser injection, or replacing NERO visual judgment.
fused_reference_skills.deletion_policy: No local install is created in v1.3. Keep this as an attributed fused reference only.

fused_reference_skills.name: taste-skill
fused_reference_skills.use_for: Brief inference, anti-default discipline, visual-strength calibration, and redesign pre-flight checks.
fused_reference_skills.avoid_for: Standalone default routing, full skill transplant, or pushing NERO dashboards toward marketing or portfolio aesthetics by default.
fused_reference_skills.deletion_policy: No local install is created in v1.3. Keep this as an attributed fused reference only.

fused_reference_skills.name: effective-html
fused_reference_skills.use_for: Self-contained HTML artifacts, SVG-first architecture diagrams, visual plan pages, single-file explainers, and HTML web PPT diagram pages.
fused_reference_skills.avoid_for: Independent default routing, full skill installation by default, direct upstream example copying, or replacing NERO tokens and QA gates.
fused_reference_skills.deletion_policy: No standalone skill install is created in v1.6. Keep as an attributed fused reference only.

fused_reference_skills.name: huashu-design
fused_reference_skills.use_for: HTML-native multi-format design harness ideas, design variants, brand asset protocol, visual QA, editable deck thinking, and motion/video pipeline planning.
fused_reference_skills.avoid_for: Default TTS, audio asset copying, watermarks, provider/API key setup, full upstream asset migration, or replacing NERO route control.
fused_reference_skills.gpt_image_2_boundary: May inform visual素材 briefs and style exploration; generated images cannot carry exact text, figures, tables, chart labels, source notes, or regulatory conclusions.
fused_reference_skills.formal_ppt_boundary: Does not replace Presentations. Formal editable PPTX remains Presentations-first.
fused_reference_skills.deletion_policy: No standalone skill install or upstream asset migration is created in v1.8. Keep as an attributed fused reference only.

fused_reference_skills.name: frontend-slides
fused_reference_skills.use_for: 1920x1080 fixed-stage HTML deck production, three-style previews, web PPT style discovery, lightweight template indexing, and browser-first QA.
fused_reference_skills.avoid_for: Formal PPTX replacement, default Vercel/GitHub Pages deployment, copying bold-template code wholesale, or dense banker appendix production.
fused_reference_skills.gpt_image_2_boundary: Can provide art-direction context for web deck imagery only; exact slide text and data remain HTML/PPT layers.
fused_reference_skills.formal_ppt_boundary: Style-discovery output can inform a formal deck, but final formal PPTX still routes to Presentations.
fused_reference_skills.deletion_policy: No full template pack copy or deployment configuration is created in v1.8. Keep as an attributed fused reference only.

fused_reference_skills.name: ppt-master
fused_reference_skills.use_for: Design spec/spec lock discipline, PPT production pipeline, SVG QA, native editability checks, and AI image style-lock boundaries.
fused_reference_skills.avoid_for: Replacing Presentations as formal PPTX primary route, installing heavy dependencies, running image generation/TTS/image search/watermark removal by default, or copying large SVG/PPTX examples.
fused_reference_skills.gpt_image_2_boundary: May inform style-lock briefs for covers, sections, and scene素材 only; generated images cannot contain final text, numbers, tables, chart labels, or conclusions.
fused_reference_skills.formal_ppt_boundary: Formal editable PPTX remains Presentations-first; PptxGenJS remains legacy fallback only.
fused_reference_skills.deletion_policy: No standalone runtime install, dependency install, or example pack copy is created in v1.8. Keep as an attributed fused reference only.

fused_reference_skills.name: ppt-design-reference
fused_reference_skills.deletion_policy: Do not delete in v1.2. Keep as read-only reference until NERO PPT route proves stable on real tasks.

fused_reference_skills.name: guizang-ppt-skill
fused_reference_skills.use_for: Fused web PPT HTML rules for magazine-style and Swiss-style horizontal swipe decks, screenshot adaptation, image-slot discipline, map/location slides, and NERO-native browser QA.
fused_reference_skills.avoid_for: Formal editable PPTX, dense banker appendix, copying AGPL templates/scripts into NERO production, or using restricted assets in client-facing deliverables without license review.
fused_reference_skills.deletion_policy: Do not delete old skill automatically. Keep as read-only reference; NERO Design Team remains the entrypoint.

global_style.positioning: restrained, professional, evidence-first, high information density
avoid: marketing-style hero pages unless explicitly requested
decorative images that do not carry information
generated text or generated numbers treated as evidence

core_repositories.name: alexpate/awesome-design-systems
core_repositories.use_for: Reference mature design systems, principles, component taxonomy, governance, and token discipline.
core_repositories.avoid_for: Direct implementation; this is a reference index, not a component library.

core_repositories.name: bradtraversy/design-resources-for-developers
core_repositories.use_for: Find fonts, colors, icons, and design resource candidates.
core_repositories.avoid_for: Final style decisions without NERO-specific filtering.

applies_to: output looks generic or visually weak
disabled_when: small mechanical UI patch that already has a clear local pattern
call_rules: Start from NERO tokens and audience before selecting components or visual effects.
Reject generic marketing layouts for work tools.
Preserve evidence hierarchy over decoration.
roles.gpt_image_2_boundary: May approve gpt-image-2 style direction for covers/backgrounds, but never accepts generated text, numbers, tables, or charts as evidence.

core_repositories.name: shadcn-ui/ui
core_repositories.use_for: Default React UI baseline: accessible components, controlled composition, Tailwind-compatible styling.
core_repositories.avoid_for: Specialized enterprise widgets that Ant Design solves better.

core_repositories.name: birobirobiro/awesome-shadcn-ui
core_repositories.use_for: Discover shadcn-compatible blocks, registries, dashboards, AI app components, and extensions.
core_repositories.avoid_for: Blind copy-paste without NERO visual QA.

core_repositories.name: pbakaus/impeccable
core_repositories.use_for: Fused reference for detector-style frontend design review, anti-pattern checks, typography/layout polish, and final QA.
core_repositories.avoid_for: Installing npm package, hooks, live mode, or independent command routing by default.

core_repositories.name: Leonxlnx/taste-skill
core_repositories.use_for: Fused reference for design read, anti-default discipline, visual-strength calibration, and redesign pre-flight.
core_repositories.avoid_for: Full skill transplant or using experimental aesthetics over NERO business readability.

core_repositories.name: plannotator/effective-html
core_repositories.use_for: Fused reference for self-contained HTML explainers, SVG-first architecture diagrams, visual plan pages, and single-file design review artifacts.
core_repositories.avoid_for: Standalone skill installation, upstream example copying, or replacing maintained app architecture when a real frontend product is needed.

disabled_when: native PPTX or static image report is the primary deliverable
call_rules: Use CSS variables or Tailwind values generated from NERO tokens.
Use shadcn/ui for base controls and layout primitives.
Apply fused Impeccable/Taste checks for frontend-ui and frontend-oriented visual-audit tasks.
Apply fused effective-html checks when a one-file HTML artifact, architecture diagram, visual plan, or design-review page is the right deliverable.
Add visual enhancement only where it improves workflow comprehension.
roles.gpt_image_2_boundary: Can use gpt-image-2 only for background or empty-state imagery. UI labels, tables, charts, and form states remain coded.

core_repositories.name: carbon-design-system/carbon
core_repositories.use_for: Dense analytical tools, enterprise systems, data-heavy layouts, professional dashboard patterns.
core_repositories.avoid_for: Consumer marketing pages.

core_repositories.name: ant-design/ant-design
core_repositories.use_for: Complex tables, forms, filters, validation, modals, date controls, admin workflows, and enterprise CRUD screens.
core_repositories.avoid_for: Bespoke editorial visuals unless only structural ideas are reused.

call_rules: Use Carbon for density and hierarchy.
Use Ant Design only when enterprise controls justify the dependency or pattern.
Keep controls scannable and repeated actions ergonomic.
roles.gpt_image_2_boundary: No role in enterprise data controls except non-critical illustrative backgrounds.

core_repositories.name: apache/echarts
core_repositories.use_for: Production charts, Chinese labels, interactive dashboards, and familiar business charting.
core_repositories.avoid_for: Tiny static marks where plain SVG is enough.

core_repositories.name: antvis/G2
core_repositories.use_for: Visualization grammar, data storytelling, dashboard charts, and declarative chart composition.
core_repositories.avoid_for: Simple one-off charts where ECharts is faster.

core_repositories.name: observablehq/plot
core_repositories.use_for: Exploratory analysis, compact statistical charts, and quick graphics grammar.
core_repositories.avoid_for: Chinese enterprise dashboards needing broad ecosystem support.

disabled_when: visual-only cover image with no data
call_rules: Use `chart.palette.categorical` before inventing chart colors.
Always include unit, period, denominator, and source where relevant.
Prefer truthful chart geometry over decorative data shapes.
roles.gpt_image_2_boundary: gpt-image-2 cannot generate final charts, axis labels, data values, or source notes.

core_repositories.name: vercel/satori
core_repositories.use_for: Convert JSX/HTML-like static layouts into SVG for social cards, report cards, and cover images.
core_repositories.avoid_for: Complex browser-only CSS or interactive UI.

core_repositories.name: lovell/sharp
core_repositories.use_for: PNG/WebP/AVIF export, resize, crop, composite, compression, and final image processing.
core_repositories.avoid_for: Layout decisions; Sharp is post-processing.

core_repositories.name: thx/resvg-js
core_repositories.use_for: High-quality SVG to PNG rendering with font control.
core_repositories.avoid_for: Browser screenshots with dynamic CSS.

core_repositories.name: puppeteer/puppeteer
core_repositories.use_for: Pixel-accurate browser screenshots for HTML reports and visual QA.
core_repositories.avoid_for: Simple static SVG card rendering when Satori/resvg-js is enough.

disabled_when: editable PPTX is required as the primary output
call_rules: Use `report-theme.mjs` from NERO tokens.
Keep exact text, numbers, source notes, and charts in code.
Use gpt-image-2 only for background or cover素材 when the brief calls for it.
roles.gpt_image_2_boundary: Generated bitmap is composited underneath exact Satori/Sharp text and charts.

core_repositories.name: Presentations plugin
core_repositories.use_for: Default formal editable PPTX production, template-following decks, source-deck editing, rendered preview QA, and artifact-tool export.
core_repositories.avoid_for: HTML-only web PPT or quick local dry-run when a native artifact is not required.

core_repositories.name: ppt-design-reference
core_repositories.use_for: Fused business deck direction, commercial visual system, page-type mapping, contact-sheet thinking, and quality gates.
core_repositories.avoid_for: Independent default routing; NERO Design Team owns the PPT entrypoint.

core_repositories.name: guizang-ppt-skill
core_repositories.use_for: Fused restricted reference for web PPT HTML rules, editorial-magazine decks, Swiss locked layouts, screenshot handling, image slots, map/location slides, and browser QA.
core_repositories.avoid_for: Formal editable PPTX, dense banker appendix, direct template/script copying, or restricted asset use in client-facing deliverables without license review.

core_repositories.name: plannotator/effective-html
core_repositories.use_for: Fused permissive reference for self-contained HTML diagram pages, visual plan pages, dark-mode-aware HTML artifacts, and SVG-first web PPT explanation slides.
core_repositories.avoid_for: Formal editable PPTX, direct upstream page copying, or using sample data/copy as evidence.

core_repositories.name: gitbrent/PptxGenJS
core_repositories.use_for: Legacy local fallback for lightweight samples, local template verification, MCP dry-run, or cases where Presentations is unavailable.
core_repositories.avoid_for: Default formal PPTX production.

core_repositories.name: slidevjs/slidev
core_repositories.use_for: Markdown-based web slides, technical presentations, PDF/PNG/PPTX export, and live demo decks.
core_repositories.avoid_for: Formal banker PPTX where native PowerPoint editing fidelity is required.

call_rules: NERO Design Team is the PPT entrypoint and controller.
Choose one PPT subroute before production: formal-pptx, template-following, ppt-design-audit, web-ppt-html, or legacy-local-pptx.
Default formal PPTX to Presentations artifact-tool.
Use `ppt-business-design.md` for commercial deck direction and quality gates.
Use `web-ppt.md` for HTML/web PPT decks, especially Guizang-inspired editorial and Swiss-style decks.
Use `effective-html.md` when an HTML/web PPT deck needs a self-contained diagram, visual plan, SVG-first architecture page, or no-build single-file artifact.
For Swiss-style web PPT, run `scripts/validate-web-ppt.mjs <index.html> --mode swiss` before delivery.
Read external asset manifest before using any local third-party design asset.
Use PptxGenJS only as a legacy local fallback.
Place exact text, figures, charts, tables, and source notes by code.
roles.gpt_image_2_boundary: Generated visuals can support covers and section dividers but never replace PPTX text, tables, charts, or financial figures.

core_repositories.name: remotion-dev/remotion
core_repositories.use_for: Programmatic short videos with React, CSS, SVG, Canvas, charts, captions, and data-driven scenes.
core_repositories.avoid_for: Commercial video work before license requirements are checked.

disabled_when: static PPTX or image report is sufficient
call_rules: Use `remotion-theme.ts` from NERO tokens.
Storyboard before coding scenes.
Frame-check captions, charts, and motion readability.
roles.gpt_image_2_boundary: Generated scene images are background素材 only; exact captions, metrics, labels, and source notes stay in Remotion.

core_repositories.name: OpenAI gpt-image-2
core_repositories.use_for: Generate high-quality visual素材 for covers, concept images, background scenes, style exploration, and supporting imagery.
core_repositories.avoid_for: Exact Chinese text, financial figures, tables, chart labels, regulatory wording, or evidence-bearing data.

disabled_when: the deliverable mainly requires exact text, tables, charts, financial numbers, or regulatory wording
the prompt would include secrets, credentials, customer-sensitive evidence, or direct personal contact/payment identifiers
call_rules: Create a gpt-image-2 brief before generation.
Reference NERO design tokens and safe overlay areas.
Use Satori/Sharp, PptxGenJS, or Remotion after generation to add exact content.
Run visual QA on the final composite.
roles.gpt_image_2_boundary: Owns visual素材 generation only. Does not own factual content, text layout, numbers, charts, source notes, or formal conclusions.

default_process: For PPT route, choose subroute: formal-pptx, template-following, ppt-design-audit, web-ppt-html, or legacy-local-pptx.
For frontend-ui or frontend-oriented visual-audit, apply fused Impeccable/Taste design read, anti-slop checks, and deterministic pre-flight review.
Load NERO brand profile and master layout guidance when creating or revising a full artifact.
Select local template or create a project with scripts/nero-design.mjs.
Consult the case library for suitable style and workflow precedents.
Use repository references only for patterns and implementation guidance.
If high-quality visual素材 is needed, create a gpt-image-2 brief.
Place exact text, numbers, charts, and source notes with code.
Generate or validate export outputs when dependencies are available; otherwise record blocked export reasons.
Run visual scoring when judging readiness.
Run production-check.mjs before calling a complete artifact delivery-ready.
Archive or reference the case-library record when a reusable pattern is created.
Report brand, tokens, template, gpt-image-2 usage, export files, QA, score, and case-library status.

presentation_production_chain.name: KAT x NDT Presentation Production Chain
presentation_production_chain.routing_rule: When a task mentions KAT x NDT production chain, production packet, slide claim map, narrative variants, content freeze gate, return-to-KAT, design spec, style lock, three-direction exploration, or formal PPTX production readiness, use the presentation-production-chain route before final output.
boundary: KAT owns content, claims, evidence, exact text/data, source notes, and freeze gates.
NERO Design Team owns visual route, design spec, style lock, image direction, QA, scoring, production-check, and case archive readiness.
Presentations remains the formal editable PPTX output engine.
gpt-image-2 may create visual素材 only and cannot carry exact text, numbers, tables, chart labels, source notes, or regulatory conclusions.
